who: accounting firms processing 5–15 petty cash transactions/month
offer: For accounting firms processing 5–15 petty cash transactions/month, manual reconciliation causes delays in financial reporting. We streamline reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation and exception reporting via spreadsheets.
problem: Daily reconciliation of petty cash transactions is time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers posts on similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums for accounting tools sharing
try_it: Let users try daily transaction logging with email notifications
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant community
